title: ST MARY'S CATHOLIC CHURCH POOR FUND - 211info
text: ST MARY'S CATHOLIC CHURCH ST MARY'S CATHOLIC CHURCH POOR FUND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance for rent payment assistance, electric, natural gas bills, and gas vouchers. Funding is limited. If needs exceed available funding, St. Mary's Poor Fund volunteers will assist in finding other agencies that may be able to cover the remaining expense. 501 NW 25th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Friday 10am-11:30am Email (541) 757-1988 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 757-1988 Main phone Main phone (541) 757-1988 Alternate (541) 752-4688 St. Mary's Poor Fund Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Bring identification and any documentation relevant to assistance needed (bills or rental agreement). AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Money Gas Service Payment Assistance Rent Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST MARY'S CATHOLIC CHURCH
